headline: DECK Q4 Earnings Beat on HOKA Momentum and UGG Strength, Stock Up 5%
summary: Deckers Q4 beat was fueled by HOKA and UGG strength, while strong international demand and buybacks lifted shares 5%.

headline: Rost Stores Q1 Earnings & Sales Beat Estimates, Comp Up 17% Y/Y
summary: ROST tops Q1 estimates as sales jump 21% and comps rise 17%; shares pop after hours as the company raises full-year EPS outlook.

headline: Tapestry: Defying The Luxury Market Slowdown
summary: Tapestry (Coach, Kate Spade) shines amid luxury market weakness with revenue growth, margin expansion, and upbeat outlook.

raw.headline: Tapestry: Defying The Luxury Market Slowdown

headline: 3 Reasons to Sell TPR and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Since May 2021, the S&P 500 has delivered a total return of 77.9%. But one standout stock has more than doubled the market - over the past five years, Tapestry has surged 202% to $131.63 per share. Its momentum hasn’t stopped as it’s also gained 28.8% in the last six months thanks to its solid quarterly results, beating the S&P by 15.6%.
